_publications._publicationTitle: Early differences in auditory processing relate to Autism Spectrum Disorder traits in infants with Neurofibromatosis Type I.

_contextSnippet: When controlling for IBQ-R Activity Level, the relationship between the Initial Response/Change to the Standards at 10 months and AOSI Raw Scores dropped to a trend level though still with a strong effect size [r(9) = .49, p = .12]
details: When controlling for IBQ-R Activity Level, the relationship between Initial Response/Change to Standards at 10 months and AOSI Raw Scores dropped to trend level (r(9) = .49, p = .12)
